block_00: How to Enter the Commodity Market
block_01: Commodities can be a way to diversify your trading portfolio. But first, it is important to learn the basics of how to trade them. This simple guide will show you what you need to know.
block_03: Commodities are basic goods such as primary materials or agricultural products. Commodity trading involves speculating on the price fluctuations of certain commodities. Popular commodities include:
block_09: Commodity CFDs can be traded long (buy) or short (sell). This means:
block_10: If you think the price of a commodity will increase, you might go long (buy).
block_11: If you think the price of a commodity will decrease, you might go short (sell) it.
